title: Jan Moore
compiled_truth: Jan Moore is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-02-23 to 2002-03-25), Jan Moore sent 104 and received 589 emails, totalling 693 interactions. Top correspondents: [Tracy Geaccone](people/tracy-geaccone) (64), [Lindy Donoho](people/lindy-donoho) (58), [Tk Lohman](people/tk-lohman) (43), [Michelle Lokay](people/michelle-lokay) (40), [Lorraine Lindberg](people/lorraine-lindberg) (37). Mailbox folders observed: deleted_items, inbox, meetings, tw, tw_accounts, tw_commercial_group.
